description.content: Sets the status of a Slack AI assistant thread, for example showing a thinking indicator.

urlencoded.description: (Required) The channel ID of the assistant thread.
(Required) The thread timestamp of the assistant thread.
(Required) The status of the assistant thread (e.g., "is thinking...").

Sets the suggested prompts for a Slack AI assistant thread.

urlencoded.description: (Required) The channel ID of the assistant thread.
(Required) The thread timestamp of the assistant thread.
(Required) JSON-encoded array of suggested prompt objects with title and message fields.
An optional title to show above the suggested prompts.

(Required) The thread timestamp of the assistant thread.
(Required) The title to set for the assistant thread.

The Slack Assistant API provides the assistant.threads.* Web API methods that let apps building AI-powered assistants manage threaded conversations in Slack. It includes methods to set the status of an assistant thread (e.g., showing a thinking indicator), set suggested prompts for users to choose from, and set the title of an assistant thread. These methods help apps set user expectations during potentially slow AI responses and guide users with contextual prompt suggestions.
